visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a brightly lit warehouse store setting, featuring a large red and blue logo of Costco Wholesale at the top of the frame. A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and a dark vest, stands prominently in front of several stacked boxes containing Snoopy-themed rugs. She holds up a colorful rug featuring Snoopy and Woodstock on a red roof, smiling cheerfully at the camera with a friendly expression. (2) The camera transitions to a medium close-up focusing on the physical texture and details of the rug. A hand reaches into the frame to stroke the thick, coarse pile of the rug, specifically moving across the white Snoopy figure and the blue sky background. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the vibrant primary colors of the material. In the background, blurred retail shelves and warehouse ceilings are visible, establishing a commercial environment. (3) The woman presents several different design variations of the rugs, flipping them over to show the grey non-slip backing material. She holds a yellow rug with Snoopy hugging Woodstock amidst flowers, followed by a dark blue rug featuring a collage of Peanuts characters' faces. Her hand gestures emphasize the size and thickness of the mats, while her facial expressions remain animated and engaging throughout the product demonstration. (4) The final sequence shows the woman holding a long, horizontal three-panel rug featuring different Snoopy poses against green, yellow, and purple backgrounds. She continues to speak directly to the viewer, standing between aisles of product-filled pallets. Variety-show style text overlays and emojis appear dynamically on the screen to highlight price and feature information, adding to the fast-paced, social-media-friendly visual style.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 史努比又來一波. [Subtitle]: 我覺得好市多最近進的史努比. (2) [Slogan]: 699元 超好看. [Variety]: 史努比超美大地墊. [Subtitle]: 圖案都超級好看. (3) [Subtitle]: 這個超大的地墊呢 699元. (4) [Subtitle]: 它是57*96公分 非常的大捏. (5) [Subtitle]: 而且它的圖案是有點立體的. (6) [Subtitle]: 顏色又好繽紛喔 很像手工去製作的. (7) [Subtitle]: 而且它這毛很粗 比較好吸附髒髒. (8) [Subtitle]: 不能洗也不能乾洗 可是可以用溫和清潔劑. (9) [Subtitle]: 而且它背後都有做防滑 也很厚實. (10) [Variety]: 高機率會在折扣. [Subtitle]: 早買早享受 晚買可能會被賣光.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator holding the rugs, and 2 shoppers visible in the far background aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character is a young woman with long black hair, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt under a dark navy blue or black utility vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background is a typical Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial metal shelving, large cardboard boxes on pallets, and fluorescent lighting. Other shoppers are occasionally visible in the distance.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy, upbeat electronic pop background music featuring a driving synthesizer rhythm and a fast tempo. A female voice speaks with high pitch and a friendly, excited tone, introducing the product. There is a faint background room tone characteristic of a large commercial space. (2) A distinctive 'Pop' sound effect triggers a new phase as graphical text appears on screen. The female narrator continues her fast-paced delivery, describing the rug's features. The BGM remains constant in volume and energy, providing a continuous rhythmic bed. (3) An off-screen male voice enters the mix, exhibiting a slightly lower pitch and a supportive, conversational tone. A 'Whoosh' sound effect occurs as the camera angle shifts to a close-up of the rug's texture. The sound of the material being touched and moved creates slight incidental rustling noises. (4) Multiple 'Ding' sound effects are used to punctuate specific information about the price and designs. The interaction between the male and female voices creates a lively, interactive atmosphere. The music continues without interruption, leading into a final high-energy closing statement by the female speaker before a quick fade out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Highlight -> Variety Showcase -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote and review a new line of Snoopy-themed rugs available at Costco. By demonstrating the product's size, texture, and various designs in a high-energy, vlog-style format, the creator seeks to inform viewers of a good deal and encourage them to visit the store before the items sell out.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of the retailer (Costco), product price, and features, combined with clear calls to purchase.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality social media marketing video using classic variety-show editing techniques to drive consumer interest in licensed merchandise.
